name: Dave Stryker
abstract: Dave Stryker (born March 30, 1957) is an American jazz guitarist. He has recorded more than 35 albums as a leader and has been a featured sideman with Stanley Turrentine, Jack McDuff, and Kevin Mahogany.

concerts.label: JVC Jazz Festival: An Eye to the Future
concerts.venue: Isaac Stern Auditorium / Ronald O. Perelman Stage

about_quotes.speaker: Aebersold Jamey
about_quotes.evidence: [INTERVIEWER] ...and Dave Stryker and Scott Wendholt. [INTERVIEWEE] Yes.
about_quotes.doc_title: Aebersold Jamey — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
